utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item also contains the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health coverage with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents and related business equipment coverage with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details with costs; additional_services specifies enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required format.
